title: 奮い立たせてくれるもの

text_block_list.text:
One day, Nice Nature and I travel to Kyushu to
prepare for the Kokura Kinen and check out the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The course is pretty unique. I'm guessing that
pacing will be key to winning.
choice_data_list: I'm glad we came to see the track in person.
I'm glad we came to see the track in person.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Me too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I did wonder why we would come all the
way down here just to see the track at first.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I actually did learn something, and I got to eat tasty food to boot. I'd call that a good day.
choice_data_list: Is there anything else you want to see?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hmm... We pretty much saw everything.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And by the way, you don't have to cater to me so
much!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I know we're mainly here to see the track, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This trip is also supposed to cheer me up, right?
You know... since I was a little... down after my
last race.

Nice Nature recently competed against Tokai
Teio. She did well, but she's still feeling down due
to a lack of confidence.

So, like she said, I brought her to Kyushu for a
change of pace and to get her spirits up. I guess
she's seen right through me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My good sense of perception comes from my
mom, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
More like I wasn't even feeling that low to begin
with. You worry too much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It was Teio I was competing against. The
difference in our star quality was too much from
the start!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'd feel THAT low.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I wouldn't forget my place that bad.

She says that, but I still sense a hint of frustration
behind her words.

What can make her feel more confident? Is there
anything I can do?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Captain! Shopping district, ho! Just look at
those signs!
Shopping district... Come to think of it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But all the same... they cheer for me no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Like, who would do that? Cheer for me?! It's funny, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: They care about me sooo much.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And I get reeeeally motivated when they cheer
me on.
...That's it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-wait up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed that all shopping districts have very
similar vibes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In terms of liveliness, though, I'd say this one is a
whole lot more vibrant.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, do I sound like some sort of shopping district
connoisseur? It's not like that, really.
choice_data_list: Don't you want to check it out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I wouldn't say no to a detour!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's see if any of these shops meet my
high standards!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at that fresh fish! The scales are so
shiny!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hmph, not too shabby. I didn't know fish like this could be found in an ordinary shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Hey there, miss! You've got a good eye for fish!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Darn right I do! I'm known for it back home.

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Ain't that something! Then, let me test ya!

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Which would you choose? The squid on the right
or the one on the left?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, I'd choose the left one! The brightness
of the eyes are so different.

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you win! I can't believe such an amazing
young lady came here!

text_block_list.name: Kokura Fish Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
The squid is yours. Why don't ya have it cooked
at the restaurant in the back?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean it?! Thank you, thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
How lucky, hehe! ♪ I can't pass up such a kind
offer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer!

After that, we continue to visit shops, and Nice
Nature has fun interacting with the people in the
shopping district.

Her expression grows softer and softer as the day
goes on, and then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That was so much fun! Everyone was so frank and
energetic. I guess that's Kyushu for ya!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They were so funny too, don'tcha think? ♪ Hm, I
think I might have accidentally picked up a fake
accent from all this.
choice_data_list: Seems like they cheered you up.
Seems like they cheered you up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, they did.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I laughed so hard and had
such a blast with people.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I haven't been able to visit Kimie and
the others recently.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't feel like I could smile naturally.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is happy for me, no matter how I do.
They smile and tell me I did a great job.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But by myself, I feel so lost. I can't help but
wonder if I really did my best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, with first place, it's easy to tell, right?
You get a trophy, or in the case of the Tenno
Sho, a shield-like plaque.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those trophies are proof you've done your best,
but you only get that with first place.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I appreciate the shopping district's
unconditional acceptance of me, but... it doesn't
always feel like it's enough.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But now... I guess I'm realizing how much it means
to me to hear people call out my name.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, this is so frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Today's going exactly as you planned it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I confess... I feel so refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Can't make any excuses about my fatigue getting
in the way of my performance now, can I?
choice_data_list: In that case, let's go win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, you can't say that! That's too much
pressure!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That really took a toll on me—I'm totally drained.
I'm a sensitive soul, after all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm just joking! Hehehe...

As I thought, the people who support Nice Nature
are what gives her energy.

Today's events will surely fuel her success in the
Kokura Kinen.
